methods.description: The process of collecting and preparing marine sediment samples for chemical and biomolecular analyses, aimed at testing an innovative technology for contaminant removal.

steps.description: The marine sediment was collected in June 2016 from the First Inlet of Mar Piccolo in Taranto (coordinates: 40° 29' 2.42" N, 17° 13' 49.76" E) using a Van Veen grab at a depth of approximately 3.8 m.
steps.searchable_summary: collect marine sediment using Van Veen grab

steps.description: Three sediment samples were collected by a scuba diver in an area of approximately 1 m².
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples by scuba diver

steps.description: The samples were combined and homogenized to obtain a composite average sample.
A portion of the sediment was placed in an HDPE container and stored at −18°C for subsequent chemical and biomolecular analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: store sediment in HDPE container at −18°C
